home.hero_subtitle: Generate, customize and share your QR codes. Advanced analytics, multi-format export, public sharing with real-time tracking.
home.hero_desc: Generate, customize and share your QR codes. Simple, fast, and completely free.
home.feature_analytics_desc: Real-time scan charts, breakdown by country, devices and browsers.
home.feature_types_desc: URL, WiFi, vCard, SMS, Geoloc, WhatsApp, Email, Phone, Social and more.
home.feature_export_desc: High-res PNG, JPEG for print, vector PDF, and bulk ZIP downloads.
home.feature_share_desc: Unique short link, instantly scannable QR, real-time scan tracking.
home.feature_colors_desc: Choose QR code and background colors to match your visual identity.
home.feature_logo_desc: Embed your logo at the center of the QR code. Error correction ensures readability.
home.feature_stats_desc: Track scans in real time: device, browser, OS and trends over time.
home.feature_zip_desc: Download all selected QR codes in a single ZIP archive.
home.step_1_desc: Choose from 10 QR code types. Free sign-up in seconds, no credit card required.
home.step_2_desc: Colors, logo, size, error correction level. The preview updates in real time.
home.step_3_desc: Short link, instantly scannable QR, full scan tracking and analytics.
home.step1_desc: Free sign-up in a few seconds. No credit card required, no commitment.
home.step2_desc: Enter your URL or text, choose your colors, add your logo. The preview updates in real time.
home.step3_desc: Download in PNG, JPEG or PDF. Share via public link and analyze every scan.
home.faq_q1: What is a dynamic QR code?
home.faq_a1: A dynamic QR code lets you change the content without reprinting the code itself. Perfect for menus, marketing campaigns, or any evolving content.
home.faq_q2: What is the difference between Free and Pro?
home.faq_a2: The Free plan gives you QR code creation with basic analytics. The Pro plan unlocks full analytics, PDF/ZIP export, permanent QR codes and priority support.
home.faq_q3: Can I cancel my Pro subscription?
home.faq_a3: Yes, at any time from the Stripe customer portal. No commitment, no cancellation fees.
home.faq_a4: On the Free plan, QR codes are valid for 30 days. On the Pro plan, they are permanent and never expire.
home.faq_a5: PNG and JPEG for all plans, vector PDF and bulk ZIP for the Pro plan.
home.faq_1_a: Yes, QRaft is 100% free. You can create unlimited QR codes, customize them with your colors and logo, and export them in PNG, JPEG or PDF — no fees, no credit card.
home.faq_2_q: Can I add my logo to a QR code?
home.faq_2_a: Yes. QRaft lets you embed your logo at the center of your QR code for complete brand customization. The QR remains readable thanks to the high error correction level.
home.faq_3_a: QRaft offers three formats: PNG for the web, JPEG for standard printing, and vector PDF for perfect quality at any size.
home.faq_4_q: Can I track scans of my QR codes?
home.faq_4_a: Yes. Each QR code has complete statistics: total scan count, trends over time, breakdown by device, browser and OS, plus a geographic scan map.
home.pro_cta_subtitle: Advanced analytics · Permanent QR codes · Unlimited export · Priority support
home.pro_label: Take it to the next level
home.pro_subtitle: Permanent QR codes, full analytics, no limitations.

pricing.label: Pricing
pricing.title: TRANSPARENT PRICING
pricing.subtitle: No surprises. No hidden fees. A free plan to get started, a Pro plan to go further.
pricing.error_generic: An error occurred. Please try again.
pricing.guarantee_desc: No questions asked. Contact us within 14 days of subscribing for a full refund.
pricing.faq_1_q: Can I cancel at any time?
pricing.faq_1_a: Yes. Cancel from the Stripe customer portal, no commitment or cancellation fees.
pricing.faq_2_q: What happens to my QR codes if I cancel?
pricing.faq_2_a: Your QR codes remain active for 7 days after the paid period ends, then become inactive.
pricing.faq_3_a: Yes. Payments are handled by Stripe, PCI DSS certified. No banking data is stored on our servers.
pricing.faq_4_a: An annual subscription at €86 (i.e. €7.17/month) is available with the toggle above.
pricing.pricing_faq_q1: Can I cancel at any time?
pricing.pricing_faq_a1: Yes, at any time from the Stripe customer portal. No commitment, no cancellation fees.
pricing.pricing_faq_q2: What happens if I downgrade to Free?
pricing.pricing_faq_a2: Your QR codes remain accessible but become subject to the 30-day limit again. No data is deleted.
pricing.pricing_faq_q3: Is there a free Pro trial?
pricing.pricing_faq_a3: The Free plan is free forever and lets you test all core features. We offer a 14-day money-back guarantee on the Pro plan.
pricing.pricing_faq_a4: Yes, Stripe accepts most Visa, Mastercard and American Express credit and prepaid cards.
pricing.pricing_faq_a5: Displayed prices are excluding VAT. Applicable VAT will be calculated and shown at checkout based on your country.

expired.title: Expired QR code

wifi.meta_title: Free WiFi QR Code Generator — Share Your Network Instantly | QRaft
wifi.meta_description: Generate a QR code for your WiFi network in seconds. Visitors scan and connect — no password typing needed. Free, no signup required.
wifi.title: SHARE YOUR WIFI WITH A SINGLE SCAN.
wifi.subtitle: Generate a QR code that lets anyone connect to your WiFi network instantly. No need to spell out the password — just scan and connect.
wifi.empty_hint: Enter your network name to generate a QR code

form.title: WiFi Details
form.subtitle: Enter your network information below
form.hidden_desc: Check if your network is not visible in the WiFi list

guide.label: How it works
guide.title: CREATE YOUR WIFI QR CODE IN 4 STEPS

step1.title: ENTER YOUR NETWORK NAME
step1.body: Type the exact SSID of your WiFi network as it appears on your router.

step2.title: SELECT SECURITY TYPE
step2.body: Choose WPA/WPA2 for modern networks, WEP for older ones, or Open for public hotspots.

step3.title: ADD YOUR PASSWORD
step3.body: Enter the WiFi password. It will be encoded directly in the QR code.

step4.title: DOWNLOAD & PRINT
step4.body: Download as PNG, SVG or PDF and display it at your entrance, lobby or reception.

faq.title: FREQUENTLY ASKED QUESTIONS
faq.q1: Is the WiFi QR code really free?
faq.a1: Yes, 100% free with no signup required. Generate and download as many WiFi QR codes as you want.
faq.q2: Does the QR code store my password?
faq.a2: The password is encoded directly in the QR code image. It is not stored on any server — everything stays on your device.
faq.q3: Will it work on iPhone and Android?
faq.a3: Yes. Both iOS (11+) and Android natively support WiFi QR codes through their camera app.
faq.q4: Can I use it for my restaurant or hotel?
faq.a4: Absolutely. Print the QR code on table tents, reception cards, or wall signs so guests connect instantly.
faq.q5: What if I change my WiFi password?
faq.a5: You will need to generate a new QR code with the updated password and replace the old print.

vcard.meta_title: Free vCard QR Code Generator — Digital Business Card | QRaft
vcard.meta_description: Create a QR code for your contact card (vCard). Scan to save name, phone, email, company — instantly. Free, no signup.
vcard.title: YOUR BUSINESS CARD, ONE SCAN AWAY.
vcard.subtitle: Generate a QR code that saves your contact details directly into any phone. Perfect for networking, events and business cards.
vcard.empty_hint: Enter your name to generate a contact QR code

form.title: Contact Details
form.subtitle: Fill in the fields you want to include

step1.title: ENTER YOUR DETAILS
step1.body: Add your name, phone, email, company and website. Only the name is required.

step2.title: PREVIEW THE QR CODE
step2.body: See your QR code update in real-time as you fill in each field.

step3.title: DOWNLOAD IT
step3.body: Export as PNG, SVG or PDF — perfect for printing on business cards.

step4.title: SHARE EVERYWHERE
step4.body: Print it on your card, add it to your email signature, or display at events.

faq.title: FREQUENTLY ASKED QUESTIONS
faq.q1: What is a vCard QR code?
faq.a1: A vCard QR code encodes your contact information (name, phone, email, etc.) so anyone can save it directly to their phone contacts by scanning.
faq.q2: Does it work on all phones?
faq.a2: Yes. All modern smartphones (iOS and Android) support vCard QR codes through their built-in camera app.
faq.a3: The standard vCard QR code does not include photos as it would make the QR too complex to scan reliably. Use a Pro account to add a logo.
faq.a4: QR codes work best under 300 characters. Include only essential contact fields for optimal scan reliability.
faq.q5: Can I update my details after printing?
faq.a5: Static QR codes cannot be changed. With a Pro account, you get dynamic QR codes that can be updated anytime.

menu_restaurant.meta_title: Free Restaurant Menu QR Code Generator | QRaft
menu_restaurant.meta_description: Create a QR code for your restaurant menu. Link to your digital menu, PDF or website. Customers scan and browse — contactless. Free.
menu_restaurant.title: YOUR MENU, ACCESSIBLE IN ONE SCAN.
menu_restaurant.subtitle: Create a QR code that links directly to your digital menu. Perfect for restaurants, cafes, bars and food trucks.
menu_restaurant.empty_hint: Enter the URL of your menu to generate a QR code

guide.label: How it works
guide.title: SET UP YOUR MENU QR CODE

step1.title: HOST YOUR MENU ONLINE
step1.body: Upload your menu as a PDF or create a page on your website with the full menu.

step2.title: PASTE THE LINK
step2.body: Enter the URL of your online menu in the form above.

step3.title: GENERATE & DOWNLOAD
step3.body: Download the QR code as PNG, SVG or PDF in high resolution.

step4.title: PRINT & DISPLAY
step4.body: Place QR codes on tables, at the entrance, or on takeaway packaging.

faq.title: FREQUENTLY ASKED QUESTIONS
faq.q1: Why use a QR code for my restaurant menu?
faq.a1: It's hygienic (contactless), saves printing costs, and lets you update your menu anytime without reprinting.
faq.q2: Do customers need an app to scan?
faq.a2: No. All modern smartphones can scan QR codes directly from the camera app. No special app needed.
faq.q3: Can I link to a PDF menu?
faq.a3: Yes. Upload your PDF anywhere (Google Drive, your website) and use that link. The QR code will open it directly.
faq.q4: What if I change my menu?
faq.a4: If you keep the same URL, just update the content at that link. With a Pro account, you can also change the destination URL without reprinting.
faq.q5: Can I track how many people scan it?
faq.a5: Yes! Create a free QRaft account to get scan analytics: number of scans, device types, location, and more.

google_reviews.meta_title: Free Google Reviews QR Code Generator — Get More Reviews | QRaft
google_reviews.meta_description: Create a QR code that links directly to your Google review page. Boost your ratings with one scan. Free, no signup required.
google_reviews.title: BOOST YOUR GOOGLE REVIEWS WITH ONE SCAN.
google_reviews.subtitle: Generate a QR code that takes customers directly to your Google review page. Print it, display it, watch your ratings grow.
google_reviews.empty_hint: Enter your Google Reviews URL to generate a QR code

form.title: Google Reviews Link
form.subtitle: Paste your Google Business review link
form.help: Find your link in Google Business Profile → Share → Ask for reviews

step1.title: FIND YOUR REVIEW LINK
step1.body: Open Google Business Profile, click 'Ask for reviews' and copy the link.

step2.title: PASTE IT HERE
step2.body: Enter the link in the form above to generate your QR code instantly.

step3.title: DOWNLOAD & PRINT
step3.body: Export as PNG, SVG or PDF. Print on receipts, cards, or counter displays.

step4.title: COLLECT REVIEWS
step4.body: Customers scan, rate you on Google, and your average rating climbs.

faq.title: FREQUENTLY ASKED QUESTIONS
faq.q1: Where do I find my Google Reviews link?
faq.a1: Log into Google Business Profile, go to Home, click 'Ask for reviews'. Copy the link that appears.
faq.q2: Does the customer need a Google account?
faq.a2: Yes, customers need a Google account to leave a review. But most people already have one on their phone.
faq.q3: Can I customize the QR code design?
faq.a3: With a free QRaft account, you can change colors, add your logo, and adjust the error correction level.
faq.q4: How many more reviews can I expect?
faq.a4: Businesses that display a Google Reviews QR code typically see a 2-5x increase in review volume within the first month.
faq.a5: Yes. Google encourages businesses to ask for reviews. Just don't offer incentives for positive reviews — that violates their guidelines.

whatsapp.meta_title: Free WhatsApp QR Code Generator — Start Chats Instantly | QRaft
whatsapp.meta_description: Create a QR code that opens a WhatsApp chat with your number. Add a pre-filled message. Free, no signup required.
whatsapp.title: START A WHATSAPP CHAT WITH ONE SCAN.
whatsapp.subtitle: Generate a QR code that opens a WhatsApp conversation with your number. Perfect for customer support, orders, and bookings.
whatsapp.empty_hint: Enter your phone number to generate a WhatsApp QR code

form.title: WhatsApp Details
form.subtitle: Enter your WhatsApp number and optional message
form.message_placeholder: Hi! I'd like to know more about...

step1.title: ENTER YOUR NUMBER
step1.body: Type your full phone number with country code (e.g. +33 for France, +1 for US).

step2.title: ADD A MESSAGE
step2.body: Optionally set a pre-filled message that appears when the chat opens.

step3.title: GENERATE & DOWNLOAD
step3.body: Download your QR code in PNG, SVG or PDF format.

step4.title: DISPLAY ANYWHERE
step4.body: Print it on flyers, packaging, business cards, or shop windows.

faq.title: FREQUENTLY ASKED QUESTIONS
faq.q1: Does the person need WhatsApp installed?
faq.a1: Yes. The QR code generates a wa.me link that opens the WhatsApp app. If not installed, it redirects to the download page.
faq.q2: Can I include a pre-filled message?
faq.a2: Yes. Set a default message in the form and it will appear in the chat input when the customer scans the code.
faq.a3: The phone number is encoded in the QR code link. Anyone who scans it will see your number in WhatsApp.
faq.q4: Can I use a WhatsApp Business number?
faq.a4: Absolutely. Both regular and WhatsApp Business numbers work. The link format is identical.
faq.a5: Yes, 100% free. Generate as many WhatsApp QR codes as you want without creating an account.

email.meta_title: Free Email QR Code Generator — Pre-filled Mailto Link | QRaft
email.meta_description: Create a QR code that opens an email with pre-filled recipient, subject, and body. Free, no signup required.
email.title: SEND AN EMAIL WITH ONE SCAN.
email.subtitle: Generate a QR code that opens the email app with a pre-filled address, subject and message. Ideal for feedback, support, and contact.
email.empty_hint: Enter an email address to generate a QR code

form.title: Email Details
form.subtitle: Set the recipient and optional pre-filled content
form.subject: Subject (optional)

step1.title: ENTER THE EMAIL
step1.body: Type the recipient email address that should receive the message.

step2.title: ADD SUBJECT & BODY
step2.body: Optionally pre-fill the subject line and message body.

step3.title: GENERATE THE QR CODE
step3.body: Your QR code is created instantly. Preview it in real-time.

step4.title: SHARE IT
step4.body: Download and print on business cards, flyers, product packaging, or posters.

faq.title: FREQUENTLY ASKED QUESTIONS
faq.q1: What happens when someone scans it?
faq.a1: Their default email app opens with the recipient, subject, and body already filled in. They just hit Send.
faq.q2: Does it work with Gmail, Outlook, etc.?
faq.a2: Yes. The QR code uses the standard mailto: protocol which works with any email client.
faq.q3: Can I track how many emails are sent?
faq.a3: The QR code opens the user's email app, so we can't track sends. With a Pro account, you can track scans though.
faq.q4: Is the email address visible in the QR?
faq.a4: The email is encoded in the QR code data. It's not visible by looking at the code, but any QR reader will decode it.
faq.q5: Can I add CC or BCC recipients?
faq.a5: The standard mailto: format supports CC and BCC, but for simplicity we focus on the primary recipient. You can manually edit the generated URL.

sms.meta_title: Free SMS QR Code Generator — Send Texts Instantly | QRaft
sms.meta_description: Create a QR code that opens an SMS with a pre-filled number and message. Perfect for opt-ins, support, and quick contact. Free.
sms.title: SEND AN SMS WITH ONE SCAN.
sms.subtitle: Generate a QR code that opens the messaging app with a pre-filled number and text. Great for opt-ins, feedback and quick contact.
sms.empty_hint: Enter a phone number to generate an SMS QR code

form.title: SMS Details
form.subtitle: Set the recipient number and message

step1.title: ENTER THE NUMBER
step1.body: Type the phone number that should receive the text message.

step2.title: ADD A MESSAGE
step2.body: Optionally pre-fill a message like 'JOIN' or 'INFO' for opt-in campaigns.

step3.title: GENERATE & DOWNLOAD
step3.body: Your QR code is ready. Download in PNG, SVG or PDF.

step4.title: PRINT & DISPLAY
step4.body: Place on posters, flyers, product packaging or event signage.

faq.title: FREQUENTLY ASKED QUESTIONS
faq.q1: Does it work on iPhone and Android?
faq.a1: Yes. Both platforms support the sms: protocol and will open the native messaging app.
faq.a2: No. The messaging app opens with the text pre-filled, but the user must tap Send manually.
faq.q3: Can I use it for SMS marketing opt-ins?
faq.a3: Yes. Set the message to a keyword like 'JOIN' so customers can subscribe to your SMS list by scanning.
faq.a4: Yes. Include the full country code (e.g. +44 for UK, +33 for France) to ensure it works globally.
faq.a5: Yes, generating the QR code is 100% free. Standard SMS rates from the user's carrier apply when sending.

location.meta_title: Free Location QR Code Generator — Share Maps Coordinates | QRaft
location.meta_description: Create a QR code that opens Google Maps or Apple Maps to a specific location. Perfect for directions. Free, no signup.
location.title: SHARE A LOCATION WITH ONE SCAN.
location.subtitle: Generate a QR code that opens a map to your exact coordinates. Ideal for businesses, events, meeting points and parking lots.
location.empty_hint: Enter coordinates or an address to generate a location QR code

form.title: Location Details
form.subtitle: Enter coordinates or a place name
form.label: Place name (optional)

step1.title: ENTER COORDINATES
step1.body: Type the latitude and longitude, or find them on Google Maps by right-clicking a location.

step2.title: ADD A LABEL
step2.body: Optionally add a place name for clarity when the map opens.

step3.title: GENERATE THE QR CODE
step3.body: Your QR code is created instantly with a live preview.

step4.title: SHARE DIRECTIONS
step4.body: Print on invitations, business cards, event tickets or signage.

faq.title: FREQUENTLY ASKED QUESTIONS
faq.a1: The QR code uses the geo: URI scheme. On Android, it opens Google Maps. On iOS, it opens Apple Maps by default.
faq.q2: How do I find my coordinates?
faq.a2: Open Google Maps, right-click your location, and click the coordinates to copy them.
faq.q3: Can I add a pin label?
faq.a3: Yes. The label field adds a query parameter that shows a named pin on the map.
faq.a4: The QR code encodes coordinates locally, but the user needs an internet connection to load the map.
faq.q5: Can I use an address instead of coordinates?
faq.a5: For best accuracy, use coordinates. However, you can use the label field with a full address and it will search for it.

event.meta_title: Free Event QR Code Generator — Calendar Invite in One Scan | QRaft
event.meta_description: Create a QR code that adds an event to the calendar. Set title, date, time, location. Scan to save. Free, no signup.
event.title: ADD AN EVENT TO ANY CALENDAR WITH ONE SCAN.
event.subtitle: Generate a QR code that creates a calendar event with title, date, time and location. Perfect for conferences, weddings and meetups.
event.empty_hint: Enter event details to generate a calendar QR code

form.title: Event Details
form.subtitle: Fill in the event information
form.description_placeholder: Join us for our annual company meetup...

step1.title: ENTER EVENT DETAILS
step1.body: Add the title, start/end date and time, location and a description.

step2.title: PREVIEW IT
step2.body: See the QR code update in real-time as you fill in the form.

step3.title: DOWNLOAD
step3.body: Export as PNG, SVG or PDF for digital or print use.

step4.title: DISTRIBUTE
step4.body: Print on event posters, tickets, flyers or share digitally via social media.

faq.title: FREQUENTLY ASKED QUESTIONS
faq.a1: The QR code generates an iCalendar (VCALENDAR) format supported by Google Calendar, Apple Calendar, Outlook and more.
faq.q2: Can I include a time zone?
faq.a2: The event uses the local time. For international events, mention the timezone in the description.
faq.a3: Most calendar apps add a default reminder when importing an event. The exact timing depends on the user's settings.
faq.q4: Can I add multiple events in one QR code?
faq.a4: Each QR code encodes one event. For multi-day conferences, create one QR code per session or day.
faq.a5: Yes, 100% free. No account needed. Generate unlimited event QR codes.

social_media.meta_title: Free Social Media QR Code Generator — Link Your Profiles | QRaft
social_media.meta_description: Create a QR code for your Instagram, TikTok, LinkedIn, X, YouTube or Facebook profile. One scan, instant follow. Free.
social_media.title: GROW YOUR FOLLOWING WITH ONE SCAN.
social_media.subtitle: Generate a QR code that links directly to your social media profile. Perfect for business cards, merch, events and storefronts.
social_media.empty_hint: Enter your social media profile URL

form.title: Social Profile
form.subtitle: Paste the URL of the profile you want to link

guide.label: How it works
guide.title: CREATE YOUR SOCIAL MEDIA QR CODE

step1.title: COPY YOUR PROFILE URL
step1.body: Go to your profile on Instagram, TikTok, LinkedIn, X, YouTube or Facebook and copy the URL.

step2.title: PASTE IT HERE
step2.body: Enter the URL in the form. We auto-detect the platform.

step3.title: CUSTOMIZE & DOWNLOAD
step3.body: Download your QR code in PNG, SVG or PDF format.

step4.title: SHARE EVERYWHERE
step4.body: Print on business cards, product packaging, merch, menus, posters.

faq.title: FREQUENTLY ASKED QUESTIONS
faq.a1: Any platform with a public profile URL: Instagram, TikTok, LinkedIn, X (Twitter), YouTube, Facebook, Snapchat, Pinterest, etc.
faq.q2: Does it open the app or the website?
faq.a2: If the social media app is installed, it usually opens the app directly. Otherwise, it opens the mobile website.
faq.q3: Can I link to multiple profiles?
faq.a3: Each QR code links to one profile. For multiple profiles, create a free QRaft account and use a bio link page (coming soon).
faq.q4: Can I track how many people scan it?
faq.a4: Yes! Create a free QRaft account to get detailed scan analytics: count, device, location and more.
faq.a5: Yes. Generate unlimited social media QR codes with no signup and no watermark.

pdf.meta_title: Free PDF QR Code Generator — Link to Any Document | QRaft
pdf.meta_description: Create a QR code that opens a PDF document. Link to menus, brochures, manuals, pricelists. Scan to view. Free.
pdf.title: OPEN A PDF WITH ONE SCAN.
pdf.subtitle: Generate a QR code that links directly to your PDF document. Perfect for menus, brochures, manuals and price lists.
pdf.empty_hint: Enter the URL of your PDF to generate a QR code

form.title: PDF Link
form.subtitle: Paste the URL where your PDF is hosted

step1.title: UPLOAD YOUR PDF
step1.body: Host your PDF on Google Drive, Dropbox, your website, or any public URL.

step2.title: PASTE THE LINK
step2.body: Copy the direct link to your PDF and paste it in the form.

step3.title: GENERATE THE QR CODE
step3.body: Your QR code is created instantly with a live preview.

step4.title: PRINT & DISTRIBUTE
step4.body: Place on product packaging, brochures, posters, business cards.

faq.title: FREQUENTLY ASKED QUESTIONS
faq.q1: Where should I host my PDF?
faq.a1: Anywhere with a public URL: Google Drive (set sharing to 'Anyone with the link'), Dropbox, your own website, etc.
faq.q2: Will it work on all devices?
faq.a2: Yes. All modern smartphones can open PDF files directly in the browser or a PDF viewer app.
faq.q3: Can I update the PDF later?
faq.a3: If you keep the same URL and replace the file, the QR code will always link to the latest version.
faq.q4: Is there a file size limit?
faq.a4: The QR code only contains the URL, not the file itself. There's no size limit — it depends on your hosting.
faq.a5: The QR code links to the URL. If your PDF host supports password protection, you can use that feature independently.

crypto.meta_title: Free Bitcoin & Crypto QR Code Generator | QRaft
crypto.meta_description: Create a QR code for Bitcoin, Ethereum or Litecoin payments. Encode wallet address and amount. Free, no signup.

form.title: Crypto Details
form.subtitle: Select currency and enter wallet address

step2.title: ENTER YOUR ADDRESS
step2.body: Paste your wallet address. Double-check it — transactions are irreversible.

step3.title: SET AN AMOUNT
step3.body: Optionally set a payment amount that will pre-fill in the sender's wallet.

step4.title: DOWNLOAD & DISPLAY
step4.body: Print on invoices, donation pages, point-of-sale displays or your website.

faq.title: FREQUENTLY ASKED QUESTIONS
faq.a1: Bitcoin (BTC), Ethereum (ETH) and Litecoin (LTC). We use the standard URI scheme for each (BIP21 for BTC).
faq.a2: No. The amount is optional. If omitted, the sender can enter any amount in their wallet app.
faq.q3: Does it work with all wallets?
faq.a3: Yes. Any wallet that supports the standard URI scheme (bitcoin:, ethereum:, litecoin:) will recognize the QR code.
faq.a4: The QR code only contains your public wallet address. It never contains private keys or sensitive data.
faq.q5: Can I use it for donations?
faq.a5: Yes. Display the QR code on your website, livestream, or print it for in-person donations.

step1.body: Type the full phone number with country code for international compatibility.

step3.body: Export in PNG, SVG or PDF — perfect for any print format.

step4.title: DISPLAY IT
step4.body: Print on business cards, shop windows, car wraps, flyers or posters.

faq.title: FREQUENTLY ASKED QUESTIONS
faq.q1: Will it call immediately when scanned?
faq.a1: No. The phone dialer opens with the number pre-filled. The user must tap the call button to initiate the call.
faq.a2: Yes. Any valid phone number works — mobile, landline, toll-free, international.
faq.q3: Should I include the country code?
faq.a3: Yes. Always include the country code (e.g. +1, +44, +33) to ensure the QR code works internationally.
faq.q4: Can I use it for WhatsApp calls?
faq.a4: No. This opens the standard phone dialer. For WhatsApp, use our dedicated WhatsApp QR code generator.
faq.a5: Yes, 100% free with no limits. Generate as many phone QR codes as you need.

text.meta_description: Create a QR code containing plain text. Encode messages, notes, serial numbers, or any text. Free, no signup.
text.title: ENCODE ANY TEXT IN A QR CODE.
text.subtitle: Generate a QR code that displays plain text when scanned. Perfect for messages, serial numbers, coupons and notes.
text.empty_hint: Type your text to generate a QR code

form.title: Your Text
form.subtitle: Enter the text to encode in the QR code

step1.title: TYPE YOUR TEXT
step1.body: Enter any text: messages, codes, serial numbers, coupons, poems — anything.

step2.title: PREVIEW
step2.body: See the QR code update as you type, character by character.

step3.title: DOWNLOAD
step3.body: Export in PNG, SVG or PDF format.

step4.title: USE ANYWHERE
step4.body: Print on packaging, greeting cards, scavenger hunts, museum labels, product tags.

faq.title: FREQUENTLY ASKED QUESTIONS
faq.q1: How much text can fit in a QR code?
faq.a1: Up to about 4,296 characters, but for reliable scanning, keep it under 300 characters. Shorter is better.
faq.q2: Can the text include special characters?
faq.a2: Yes. QR codes support the full UTF-8 character set: accents, symbols, emojis, CJK characters.
faq.q3: What happens when someone scans it?
faq.a3: The text is displayed on screen. If it contains a URL, most scanners offer to open it. Plain text is just shown.
faq.q4: Can I use it for coupon codes?
faq.a4: Absolutely. Encode discount codes, promo codes, or serial numbers that your POS system can scan and validate.
faq.q5: Is there a difference between text and URL QR codes?
faq.a5: A URL QR code auto-opens the link. A text QR code just displays the content. Use text for non-URL data.

faq.title: FREQUENTLY ASKED QUESTIONS
faq.q1: Can I link to both App Store and Google Play?
faq.a1: Each QR code links to one URL. For cross-platform, consider using a smart link service or create two QR codes side by side.
faq.q2: Does it open the store app?
faq.a2: Yes. On iOS, the App Store link opens the App Store app. On Android, the Google Play link opens the Play Store.
faq.a3: The QR code tracks scans (with a QRaft account). Actual download tracking is done through the store's analytics.
faq.a4: The links also work in desktop browsers, showing the store listing page where users can send the app to their phone.
faq.a5: Yes. No signup, no watermark, no limits. Generate app download QR codes for free.
